profile.quote: In this villa, every number obeys me. Chaos is an intrusion. Intrusion must be erased
profile.imageAlt: The Architect, a shadowed figure controlling MathVilla

status.title: SYSTEM LAG
status.message: Network unstable... Searching for the source...

anomaly.label: Anomaly Detected
anomaly.message: Unknown entities detected inside the villa. Tracing...

paragraphs: Together they are breaking the system...
Time is no longer in favour.
I will find the intruder and restore order, no matter the cost.
intruderSearch.imageAlt: A lone intruder standing before a glowing mathematical gateway
